rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski, Based on Morphisec report by Michael Gorelik (@smgoreli)
rule_metadata.title: IISReset Used to Stop IIS Services

rules.rule_text:
title: IISReset Used to Stop IIS Services
id: 3a56827c-353e-4e86-b429-674abae37f32
status: experimental
description: "Detects the use of the iisreset.exe utility to stop IIS web services.\
  \ This is used to prevent users \nfrom accessing IIS web resources, thereby releasing/preventing\
  \ locks which could inhibit \nransomware-related encryption.\n"
references:
- https://engage.morphisec.com/threat-analysis-cicada3301
author: Micah Babinski, Based on Morphisec report by Michael Gorelik (@smgoreli)
date: 2024-09-07
tags:
- attack.impact
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1562
- attack.t1562.001
- attack.t1529
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_1:
  - Image|endswith: \iisreset.exe
  - OriginalFileName: iisreset.exe.mui
  selection_2:
    CommandLine|contains: /stop
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Legitimate use
level: medium
